message.content:
{
  "units": [
    {
      "unit_id": "U1",
      "chapters": [
        {
          "source_chapter_name": "Computational Thinking and Programming – 2",
          "source_type": "explicit_chapter",
          "node_type": "chapter",
          "topics": [
            "Revision of Python topics covered in Class XI",
            "Functions: types, arguments, parameters, scope, flow of execution",
            "Exception Handling: try-except-finally blocks",
            "File Types and Operations"
          ],
          "subtopics": [
            "Text file operations (modes, read/write methods, seek/tell)",
            "Binary file operations (pickle module, dump/load, search/update)",
            "CSV file handling (csv module, writer/reader functions)",
            "Stack Data Structure: push/pop operations and list implementation"
          ],
          "key_concepts": [
            "Revision",
            "Functions",
            "Exception Handling",
            "File Types"
          ],
          "assessment_status": "summative"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "unit_id": "U2",
      "chapters": [
        {
          "source_chapter_name": "Computer Networks",
          "source_type": "explicit_chapter",
          "node_type": "chapter",
          "topics": [
            "Evolution of networking: ARPANET, NSFNET, INTERNET",
            "Data communication terminologies and components",
            "Transmission media: Wired and Wireless",
            "Network devices and topologies"
          ],
          "subtopics": [
            "Switching techniques (Circuit switching, Packet switching)",
            "Wired media types (Twisted pair, Co-axial, Fiber-optic)",
            "Wireless media types (Radio waves, Micro waves, Infrared)",
            "Network devices and topologies details"
          ],
          "key_concepts": [
            "Evolution of networking",
            "Data communication terminologies",
            "Transmission media",
            "Network devices",
            "Network protocols"
          ],
          "assessment_status": "summative"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "unit_id": "U3",
      "chapters": [
        {
          "source_chapter_name": "Database Management",
          "source_type": "explicit_chapter",
          "node_type": "chapter",
          "topics": [
            "Database concepts and Relational data model",
            "Structured Query Language (SQL): DDL, DML, constraints",
            "Advanced SQL queries: operators, clauses, aggregate functions",
            "Python-SQL Interface"
          ],
          "subtopics": [
            "Relational terms: relation, attribute, tuple, keys",
            "SQL commands and data types (char, varchar, int, float)",
            "Query operations: select, insert, update, delete, joins",
            "Python connectivity using cursor methods"
          ],
          "key_concepts": [
            "Database concepts",
            "Relational data model",
            "Structured Query Language (SQL)",
            "Python-SQL Interface"
          ],
          "assessment_status": "summative"
        }
      ]
    }
  ],
